treatment_information.treatment_response: Helped his edema over the last few days and he is peeing frequently.
Converted heart rhythm back to normal.

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Adjusted dose to help low thyroid levels.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented with atrial fibrillation and volume overload.
Lasix 20 mg PO daily was administered.

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow-up appointments listed in discharge instructions.
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient appears comfortable and clear in mental status.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient was informed about the reasons for admission and treatment outcomes.
